Interface IBlobStream

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control a Blob Stream.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BC92995E-E736-11D0-9A93-080009EC734B")]
public interface IBlobStream : IStream, ISequentialStream

Properties

Size

The size of the stream.

uint Size { get; set; }

Property Value

uint
